label: 第126話
source_locator: 単行本15巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 釘崎が倒れたことで虎杖の心は限界に達し、真人に一方的に打ちのめされる。東堂と新田新が到着し、新田は釘崎へ応急処置を施す。
summary_full: 虎杖は釘崎や伏黒と五条の高価なシャツを汚した日常を思い出すが、現実では釘崎が目の前で倒れ、宿儺の大量殺人と七海の死も重なって心が折れる。真人は虎杖へ黒閃を当て、呪霊と術師の価値観を懸けた戦争だと告げて一方的に攻撃する。とどめの直前、東堂が不義遊戯で割って入り、新田新も到着する。新田は釘崎へ応急処置を施したうえで、助かる可能性はゼロではないと説明する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: With everything that 悠仁 's been through in 渋谷 , his resolve finally gives way when 野薔薇 appears to have perished. 真人 seizes the opportunity and adds physical decimation to the mental abuse. Just when all seems lost, 悠仁's best friend arrives in time to reignite his spirit.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: A pleasant memory from much happier times. While the three first-year students were lounging at a table one day enjoying their cups of coffee, 野薔薇 knocked over her drink onto a shirt belonging to their sensei. Unamused, 野薔薇 tries to pass off the blame on 伊地知 for leaving 五条 's freshly dry-cleaned shirt in their care. 恵 and 悠仁 disagree and the three of them work together to try and dab away the stains. Despite their efforts, much of the shirt remained stained. In full denial, 野薔薇 suggested the shirt could pass off from a Marimekko. 恵 believed that would be an insult to the fashion industry and looked up the brand of the shirt on his smartphone. 野薔薇 wanted to know how much it costs to possibly replace it. However, she and 悠仁 were dumbfounded when 恵 showed them it costs 250,000 yen before tax. 野薔薇 asked the boys to put down 80,000 each while she puts 90,000 but they naturally refused. The grim reality sets in for 悠仁. Instead, they hide the dirty shirt inside 恵's uniform, annoying him. 悟 arrived to get it and immediately noticed the bulge in 恵's jacket as well as the irritated scowl on his face. Unable to hold pretend any longer, 悠仁 and 野薔薇 let out their laughs and took the shirt out of 恵's uniform. This pleasant memory is stark in contrast to reality. Currently, 野薔薇 lays before 悠仁, missing an eye, and likely dead. Losing to 脹相 , 宿儺 's rampage, and 七海 's death had already taken a toll on 悠仁's resolve. Having reached its limit a long time ago, 悠仁's spirit breaks after 野薔薇 is unable to answer as he desperately calls her name. Satisfied with himself, 真人 commends his own talents and believes he is a true cruse. He not only reinforces a punch with 呪力 but successfully unleashes 黒閃 on 悠仁. 真人 proves 悠仁 will never defeat him with weak determination. The sparks of black do not choose who to bless. 真人's 黒閃 sends 悠仁 crashing through the station. The special grade continues to beat on him while exposing 悠仁's determination for being weak. 真人 believes this isn't simply a battle to fix something, it's a war of truths. He believes 悠仁 is the same as him because he kills without hesitation just as 悠仁 saves people without a second thought. This pits the instincts of a curse against dignified human reasoning. 真人 believes this conflict will determine which of the two remains one hundred years from now. " We are the exception! " After thoroughly beating 悠仁 down both mentally and physically, 真人 asks the student how he ever planned on winning and if he's ever counted how many curses he's exorcised. 真人 has never cared about how many people he's killed and believes he'll forget about 悠仁 eventually. He morphs his arm into a praying mantis-like claw and attempts to kill 悠仁. However, there is a clapping noise and suddenly 真人 is displaced. 東堂葵 appears just in time, having used 不義遊戯 to switch places with 真人. He says that the prosperous have no choice but to eventually decline, but adds that they are the exception. 真人 recognizes the scar on 東堂's face and his 術式 from 花御 . Kyoto first-year 新田新 also joins the scene after medically treating 野薔薇. He believes she's probably going to die and asks his senpai not to blame him for it later. 葵 mostly tells him to help his brother 悠仁 next before telling his nearly defeated friend that he must wake up as their battle is just beginning!

candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: The 渋谷事変 虎杖悠仁 & 釘崎野薔薇 vs. 真人 (終了) 虎杖悠仁 & 釘崎野薔薇 vs. 真人 (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 東堂葵の術式 不義遊戯 新田新の術式 新's 名称不明の生得術式 術式 真人の術式 無為転変 黒閃

key_events_verified_phase7: 虎杖が釘崎・伏黒との日常を回想する
真人が黒閃で虎杖を打ち倒す
東堂が不義遊戯で虎杖を救う
新田新が釘崎へ傷の悪化を止める処置を施す
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
